titleEn: Australia gets its first in-ovo sexing technology for layer production
titleZh: 澳大利亚引入首项蛋鸡产业卵内性别鉴定技术
summaryZh: Specialised Breeders Australia (SBA) 宣布在澳大利亚及亚太地区首次引入卵内性别鉴定技术，该技术由EW集团历时15年研发，以Cheggy品牌提供。采用该技术生产的雌性雏鸡将获得人道认证，预计2026年6月1日起供应。此举经过两年与客户、监管机构及非政府组织的协商，旨在提升蛋鸡生产中的动物福利水平。
featuredReason: 该技术是智慧畜牧中精准养殖与动物福利结合的重要案例，通过自动化性别鉴定减少雄性雏鸡淘汰，对蛋鸡产业可持续发展具有标杆意义。
contentFull: Genetics and breeding Breeders and hatcheries Hatchery management Australia gets its first in-ovo sexing technology for layer production SBA introduces Cheggy ahead of June 2026 availability 15 May 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Oceania Specialised Breeders Australia (SBA) announced the introduction of in-ovo sexing technology to Australia, marking a first for both the country and the wider Asia-Pacific region. The technology, developed and refined over more than 15 years within the EW Group, will be offered under the Cheggy brand as an optional treatment for customers seeking a more humane hatch process.Female chicks produced using the Cheggy in-ovo sexing process will carry the Certified Humane certification and are set to become available from June 1, 2026. SBA said the decision followed two years of consultations with customers, regulators and NGOs on the future of animal welfare in layer production. translationZh:
Specialised Breeders Australia (SBA) 宣布在澳大利亚引入卵内性别鉴定技术，这标志着该国及更广泛的亚太地区首次实现这一突破。该技术由EW集团历时15年多研发并不断完善，将以Cheggy品牌提供，作为寻求更人道孵化流程的客户的可选处理方案。

采用Cheggy卵内性别鉴定技术生产的雌性雏鸡将获得人道认证，预计自2026年6月1日起可供货。SBA表示，这一决定是在与客户、监管机构及非政府组织就蛋鸡生产中动物福利的未来进行两年磋商后做出的。
contentHtml:
Australia gets its first in-ovo sexing technology for layer production 
SBA introduces Cheggy ahead of June 2026 availability
